name: Computer Accessories & Peripherals
description: which encompass external input, output, and interaction devices designed to complement desktop and laptop computers, including keyboards, pointing devices, webcams, printers, scanners, audio peripherals, and control tools that improve usability, efficiency, ergonomics, and everyday human–computer interaction.

name: Tablet Accessories
description: which are tablet-specific external add-ons (cases/folios, covers, screen protectors, stylus pens, and tablet keyboard cases/stands) designed for fit and daily use, not hardware replacement parts like screens, batteries, or charging ports.

name: Laptop Accessories
description: which are laptop-focused add-ons for portability and daily use (e.g., sleeves/bags, stands/cooling pads, USB-C hubs/docks, adapters, chargers), rather than internal components, storage media, or networking equipment.

name: Computers & Tablets
description: which are complete, ready-to-use devices (desktops, laptops/notebooks, 2-in-1 convertibles, and tablets) sold as full systems with an operating system, rather than individual components, accessories, monitors, or storage devices.

name: Computer Components
description: which refer to internal hardware elements used to assemble, upgrade, or customize computing systems, including processors, mainboards, graphics cards, memory modules, power supplies, cooling assemblies, and expansion cards that determine performance, compatibility, and system-level capabilities.

name: Data Storage
description: which focus on persistent digital information retention and retrieval, covering removable and fixed storage solutions such as hard disk drives, solid-state drives, network-attached storage units, and backup media that manage capacity, speed, reliability, and long-term data preservation.

name: Networking Products
description: which are network connectivity devices such as routers/mesh systems, switches, modems/gateways, and wireless access points, often described by Wi-Fi standards, LAN/WAN ports, and throughput (Mbps/Gbps), rather than computers, storage devices, or general accessories.

name: Monitors
description: which provide visual output interfaces for computing systems, offering dedicated display panels with varying resolutions, refresh characteristics, color accuracy levels, and form factors designed for general productivity, media consumption, gaming performance, and professional visual workflows.

name: Servers
description: which are specialized computing platforms engineered for continuous operation and centralized workload handling, delivering processing resources, memory capacity, storage integration, and management features required for hosting services, managing databases, running virtualized environments, and supporting enterprise infrastructure.

name: Tablet Replacement Parts
description: which are tablet-specific repair parts (e.g., screens/digitizers, batteries, charging ports, flex cables, speakers/buttons) matched to exact model numbers, not everyday accessories like cases, protectors, keyboards, or styluses.
